workout_name: Alpine Loop Sweet Spot & Over-Under Intervals
reasoning: We're targeting poor lactate clearance and enhancing your aerobic base by incorporating a tailored set of over-under intervals. Your last ride was a steady endurance session, which is key for building base stamina. Today's ride will prepare you for sustaining high power on the Alpine Loop climbs, improving your fatigue resistance by simulating race conditions.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Do 6x7 minute intervals with 2 minutes at 201-218W followed by 5 minutes at 242-256W. Rest 3 minutes between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: close the 5-to-20 gap with over-unders and Zone 2 base work.
